component.name: TuxBellum
component.summary: Install, configure, and launch Bellum via Wine/Proton on Linux

description.p: Fix: Generate GPU-specific launcher wrapper — proton run for NVIDIA, wine for AMD (matching Joepaji upstream).
Fix: Verify proton binary after download, remove msidb dependency for cross-distro compatibility.
Fix: Use direct wine command (Joepaji AMD path) instead of umu-run to prevent Vulkan window visibility issues on Wayland.
Fix: Added Edge WebView2 to install dependencies, required by Astarte Launcher UI.
Complete architectural refactor: step-based install engine, install manifest, rootless launcher, CLI, repair/doctor diagnostics.

ul.li: Step-based install engine with 12 named, testable stages
CLI frontend: install, status, uninstall, doctor, repair
Structured command execution with explicit error reporting
CI version consistency and packaging validation
State-based GUI: installed / not installed modes

description.p: Major refactoring: GTK4 monolith replacing the GTK3+Go architecture. Rebranded as TuxBellum.

ul.li: Ported all UI from GTK3 to GTK4
Integrated installer logic directly in Python (no more Go binary)
Real-time install progress with log streaming
Rebranded from Bellum Linux Installer to TuxBellum
